diagrams.title: Process Scheduling Queues
diagrams.description: Shows the three main queues in process scheduling and how processes move between them
elements: Ready Queue (processes in memory ready to execute)
I/O Queues (processes waiting for I/O devices)
diagrams.purpose: Understand process lifecycle and queue management in OS scheduling

diagrams.title: Scheduler Types Overview
diagrams.description: Depicts the three levels of scheduling in an operating system
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the three scheduler types and their roles in process management

diagrams.title: Context Switch Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step process of context switching between two processes
diagrams.purpose: Understand what happens during context switch and its overhead components
